originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning Dev: Building a High-Perf Continuous Control Engine in PufferLib
title: Building a High-Performance Continuous Control Engine in PufferLib
summary: Worked on building a continuous control engine for PufferLib, starting from a discrete grid environment. Implemented continuous state and action spaces, ported the logic to Cython for high performance, and added a dual discrete/continuous mode. The engine achieved millions of steps per second per CPU core.
